title: fix: add Anthropic max_tokens defaults, remove chickytutor
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Anthropic finds its voice
gist.blurb: Added smart defaults for Anthropic models so they don't get shy when you forget to set limits. We also tidied up the model registry, waving a fond farewell to ChickyTutor.
gist.summary: Implemented default max_tokens values for Anthropic API calls to resolve validation errors and retired the legacy ChickyTutor persona.
gist.impact: Anthropic models now work out-of-the-box without specifying token limits, preventing HTTP 400 errors.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot tuning a retro robot representing the Anthropic models. The robot was silent (error 400), now it has a speech bubble. A small chicken toy sits on a shelf in the background (nod to ChickyTutor).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot adjusting a lime green (#ecf874) dial on a retro robot's chest. The robot has a CRT head showing a happy waveform. A small pixel chicken toy sits on a nearby shelf. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic.
